tool_args.label: ADA Compliance Report - February 2023
tool_args.raw_text: ADA Compliance Report - The annual update to the NYCT Committee on the status of compliance with the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) at New York City Transit. payload.description: Annual update on ADA compliance status at NYCT including rehabilitation of key stations and ADA requirements in bus and subway transportation

The annual update to the NYCT Committee on the status of compliance with the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) at New York City Transit. The report summarizes activities for compliance including, rehabilitation of key stations and ADA requirements in bus and subway transportation.

tool_args.label: Procurements description
tool_args.raw_text: List of procurement action items requiring Board approval and items for Committee and Board information.

payload.claim_text: List of procurement action items requiring Board approval and items for Committee and Board information.
